title: A Long-Distance Friendship Over Video Calls
title_zh: 靠視訊維繫的遠距友誼

all.en: My closest friend Sophie moved to Canada three years ago for her graduate studies.
all.zh: 我最親密的朋友蘇菲三年前因為研究所學業搬到了加拿大。

all.en: Since then, we have kept our friendship alive through weekly video calls.
all.zh: 從那時起，我們透過每週的視訊通話維持著我們的友誼。

all.en: Every Sunday morning, I make a cup of coffee and wait for her face to appear on the screen.
all.zh: 每個星期天的早晨，我會泡一杯咖啡，等待她的臉出現在螢幕上。

all.en: We talk about everything, from work problems to silly things that happened during the week.
all.zh: 我們無話不談，從工作上的問題到一週中發生的傻事都聊。

all.en: Sometimes she shows me the snow outside her apartment window in Toronto.
all.zh: 有時她會讓我看她位於多倫多公寓窗外的雪景。

all.en: In return, I bring my laptop to night markets so she can hear the lively atmosphere.
all.zh: 作為回報，我會把筆電帶到夜市，讓她能聽見熱鬧的氛圍。

all.en: Despite the time difference, we always find a moment that works for both of us.
all.zh: 儘管有時差，我們總能找到一個雙方都方便的時刻。

all.en: Last month, she helped me prepare for a job interview by practicing questions over the call.
all.zh: 上個月，她透過視訊和我練習面試題目，幫我準備工作面試。

all.en: When she went through a difficult time, I stayed up late just to listen to her.
all.zh: 當她經歷艱難的時期時，我熬夜只為了傾聽她的心聲。

all.en: Distance has not weakened our friendship; in fact, it has made us appreciate each other more.
all.zh: 距離並沒有削弱我們的友誼；事實上，它讓我們更加珍惜彼此。

all.en: We are already saving money to finally meet in person next summer.
all.zh: 我們已經在存錢，準備明年夏天終於要見面了。

all.en: This week, Sophie surprised me by mailing a hand-knitted scarf in Toronto colors.
all.zh: 這週，蘇菲寄來一條多倫多色系的手織圍巾，給了我一個驚喜。

all.en: I held it up to the camera, and we both laughed at how it suited my style.
all.zh: 我把它拿到鏡頭前，我們都笑說它有多適合我的風格。

all.en: In return, I sent her a box of pineapple cakes and oolong tea from my hometown.
all.zh: 作為回報，我寄給她一盒鳳梨酥和家鄉的烏龍茶。

all.en: She unboxed everything on camera and pretended to host her own cooking show.
all.zh: 她在鏡頭前拆開所有東西，假裝在主持自己的烹飪節目。

all.en: We started a small online journal where we share weekly photos and short notes.
all.zh: 我們開始了一本小小的線上日誌，每週分享照片和簡短的心得。

all.en: Reading her entries makes me feel as if I am walking beside her every day.
all.zh: 閱讀她的紀錄讓我感覺彷彿每天都走在她身邊。

all.en: Last Friday, we celebrated her thesis submission with a virtual glass of wine.
all.zh: 上週五，我們以一杯虛擬的葡萄酒慶祝她繳交論文。

all.en: Her face glowed with relief, and I could see real tears of happiness in her eyes.
all.zh: 她的臉上散發著釋懷的光彩，我能看見她眼中真實的喜悅淚水。

all.en: Next summer feels close now, and our suitcases are almost ready in our minds.
all.zh: 明年夏天感覺近了，我們的行李箱在心中幾乎已經準備好了。

all.en: Across an ocean, we have proven that consistent love truly shortens any distance.
all.zh: 跨越一片海洋，我們證明了持續的愛真的能縮短任何距離。

all.en: In June, I finally boarded my flight to Toronto with two heavy suitcases full of gifts.
all.zh: 六月時，我終於提著兩個塞滿禮物的沉重行李箱，登上飛往多倫多的班機。

all.en: Sophie waited at the arrival gate holding the same handmade sign I had once mailed her.
all.zh: 蘇菲在入境閘口等著，手裡舉著我曾寄給她的那塊手作牌子。

all.en: We hugged for what felt like ten full minutes before either of us could speak.
all.zh: 我們相擁了彷彿整整十分鐘，才終於有人能開口說話。

all.en: She had prepared a small welcome dinner with her roommates and her closest local friends.
all.zh: 她為我準備了一場小型歡迎晚餐，邀請了她的室友與最親近的當地朋友。

all.en: Together, we visited her favorite bookshop, lakeside park, and the quiet coffee shop near campus.
all.zh: 我們一起拜訪了她最愛的書店、湖邊公園，以及校園附近那間安靜的咖啡館。

all.en: I finally saw the snow she had shown me so many times through a small screen.
all.zh: 我終於親眼看見她在小螢幕上向我展示過無數次的雪景。

all.en: We baked pineapple cakes in her tiny kitchen and shared them with her kind neighbors.
all.zh: 我們在她小小的廚房裡烤鳳梨酥，並與她善良的鄰居分享。

all.en: On my last evening, we walked along the lake and watched the sunset turn everything gold.
all.zh: 在我最後一個夜晚，我們沿著湖邊散步，看著夕陽把一切染成金色。

all.en: She slipped a small letter into my coat pocket, asking me to read it on the plane.
all.zh: 她偷偷把一封小信塞進我的外套口袋，要我在飛機上才打開。

all.en: Her words made me cry quietly above the clouds, grateful for every video call we ever made.
all.zh: 她的文字讓我在雲端上靜靜流下眼淚，感謝我們曾擁有的每一次視訊通話。

all.en: Back in Taipei, I framed the small letter Sophie had slipped into my coat pocket.
all.zh: 回到台北後，我把蘇菲偷偷塞進我外套口袋的那封小信裱了框。

all.en: It now sits on my desk as a daily reminder that real love survives long distances.
all.zh: 它如今擺在我書桌上，每日提醒著我真摯的情感能跨越遙遠的距離。

all.en: Our weekly calls continued, but now they carried the warm memories of shared lakeside walks.
all.zh: 我們每週的通話繼續著，但如今承載著一起在湖邊散步的溫暖回憶。

all.en: Sophie accepted a postdoctoral position and confirmed she would stay in Toronto two more years.
all.zh: 蘇菲接下了博士後研究的職位，並確認她會在多倫多再多待兩年。

all.en: I felt sad at first, but she reminded me that we had already mastered this distance.
all.zh: 我起初感到難過，但她提醒我我們早已掌握了這段距離的相處之道。

all.en: We began co-writing a small bilingual blog about everyday life on opposite sides of the world.
all.zh: 我們開始合寫一個小小的雙語部落格，分享世界兩端的日常生活。

all.en: She wrote about Canadian snow, polite strangers, and her favorite secondhand bookshop near campus.
all.zh: 她寫加拿大的雪、有禮的陌生人，以及她最愛的校園附近二手書店。

all.en: I wrote about humid Taipei summers, busy night markets, and quiet temples on rainy afternoons.
all.zh: 我寫潮濕的台北夏天、熱鬧的夜市，以及下雨午後安靜的廟宇。

all.en: Readers from twelve countries left kind comments saying our friendship gave them gentle hope.
all.zh: 來自十二個國家的讀者留下了親切的留言，說我們的友誼給了他們溫柔的希望。

all.en: Some bonds are stitched not by proximity but by promises kept faithfully across every season.
all.zh: 有些情誼不是靠近距離維繫，而是靠在每一個季節中忠實兌現的承諾。

all.en: Our small bilingual blog gradually attracted a quiet community of long-distance friends from many countries.
all.zh: 我們小小的雙語部落格漸漸吸引了一個來自許多國家、安靜的遠距朋友社群。

all.en: Readers began sharing their own stories of friendships stretched across oceans, deserts, and busy time zones.
all.zh: 讀者開始分享他們自己跨越海洋、沙漠與繁忙時區的友誼故事。

all.en: Sophie suggested we create a monthly column featuring one reader's long-distance friendship every issue.
all.zh: 蘇菲提議我們開設一個每月專欄，每期介紹一位讀者的遠距友誼故事。

all.en: The first featured pair were two grandmothers who had been pen pals for forty-three quiet years.
all.zh: 第一對受訪者是兩位筆友奶奶，她們已安靜地通信了四十三年。

all.en: Their letters, scanned and translated, made many readers cry softly during their morning commute.
all.zh: 她們掃描翻譯後的信件，讓許多讀者在早晨通勤時靜靜流下了眼淚。

all.en: Sophie and I held a small online gathering, and over two hundred readers joined from everywhere.
all.zh: 蘇菲和我舉辦了一場小型線上聚會，超過兩百位讀者從世界各地加入。

all.en: Each guest shared a single sentence about the friend who kept them feeling steady through hard years.
all.zh: 每位來賓都分享一句話，談那位在艱難歲月中讓他們感到安定的朋友。

all.en: By the end of the call, my heart felt full of gentle stories from people I had never met.
all.zh: 通話結束時，我的心裡滿滿都是來自我從未見過的人們所說的溫柔故事。

all.en: Sophie quietly proposed turning these collected stories into a small printed book for our readers.
all.zh: 蘇菲悄悄提議把這些蒐集來的故事，編成一本小小的印刷書送給我們的讀者。

all.en: What began as our weekly call had quietly grown into a soft library of distant, devoted love.
all.zh: 從我們每週通話開始的緣分，竟悄悄成長為一座記載遠方深情的柔軟圖書館。

all.en: The printed book sold out within three weeks, and readers asked for a second gentle edition.
all.zh: 印刷書在三週內銷售一空，讀者紛紛要求推出第二版溫柔的續作。

all.en: Sophie flew to Taipei for the launch event held in a tiny independent bookstore near the river.
all.zh: 蘇菲飛來台北，在河邊一家小巧的獨立書店參加新書發表會。

all.en: We sat side by side reading favorite passages, and the audience laughed and cried together.
all.zh: 我們並肩坐著朗讀最喜愛的段落，觀眾跟著我們時而歡笑、時而落淚。

all.en: A young university student approached afterward, holding a worn copy filled with colorful sticky notes.
all.zh: 活動後一位年輕的大學生走來，手裡拿著貼滿彩色便利貼的舊書。

all.en: She told us our stories had given her courage to reconnect with a childhood friend abroad.
all.zh: 她告訴我們，我們的故事給了她勇氣，去重新聯絡一位住在海外的兒時好友。

all.en: Sophie and I exchanged a quiet, knowing glance, deeply moved by her brave little decision.
all.zh: 蘇菲和我交換了一個安靜而會意的眼神，被她勇敢的小小決定深深感動。

all.en: That weekend, Sophie and I revisited every café we had ever mentioned in our weekly calls.
all.zh: 那個週末，蘇菲和我重訪了我們在每週通話中曾提及的每一間咖啡館。

all.en: We took new photos to replace the old ones at the front of our shared online journal.
all.zh: 我們拍了新照片，用來替換我們共享線上日誌首頁上的舊照片。

all.en: Before her flight back, she gifted me a fresh empty notebook for the next chapter of stories.
all.zh: 她回程班機起飛前，送了我一本嶄新的空白筆記本，用來寫下下一章的故事。

all.en: I held it close, knowing our friendship would keep filling its pages for many quiet years ahead.
all.zh: 我把它緊緊抱在懷裡，知道我們的友誼將在未來許多寧靜的歲月中，繼續填滿它的每一頁。

all.en: A literary podcast invited us to record an episode about maintaining deep friendships across long distances.
all.zh: 一個文學播客邀請我們錄製一集節目，談論如何跨越遙遠距離維繫深厚的友誼。

all.en: We recorded together over a video call, laughing through stories the audience would later hear edited.
all.zh: 我們透過視訊一同錄製，笑著講述那些聽眾稍後會聽到剪輯版本的故事。

all.en: The episode reached fifty thousand listeners and inspired several universities to invite us as guest speakers.
all.zh: 那集節目觸及了五萬名聽眾，並讓好幾所大學邀請我們擔任客座講者。

all.en: Sophie joined remotely from her Toronto office while I spoke from a quiet classroom in Taipei.
all.zh: 蘇菲從多倫多的辦公室遠端參與，而我則在台北一間安靜的教室裡演講。

all.en: Students asked thoughtful questions about loneliness, patience, and choosing friendship despite our restless busy lives.
all.zh: 學生們提出了關於孤獨、耐心，以及在忙碌不安的生活中仍選擇友誼的深刻問題。

all.en: After each event, we received warm emails from listeners reconnecting with old friends after many years.
all.zh: 每場活動之後，我們都會收到聽眾的溫暖來信，他們在多年後重新聯繫了昔日的朋友。

all.en: Sophie and I decided to donate half of our book royalties to a quiet pen pal charity.
all.zh: 蘇菲和我決定將書籍版稅的一半捐給一個低調的筆友慈善機構。

all.en: The charity matched elderly residents in care homes with school children eager to send weekly letters.
all.zh: 該機構為安養院的長者與熱切想每週寫信的學童進行配對。

all.en: Reading about these new pairings during our Sunday calls became our favorite quiet weekend tradition.
all.zh: 在我們週日通話時閱讀這些新配對的故事，成了我們最愛的安靜週末傳統。

all.en: Across continents and changing seasons, our small friendship had quietly seeded countless gentle, hopeful connections.
all.zh: 跨越大陸與更迭的季節，我們這份小小的友誼悄悄孕育了無數溫柔而充滿希望的連結。

all.en: The following winter, the pen pal charity invited Sophie and me to host an annual gentle gala.
all.zh: 隔年冬天，筆友慈善機構邀請蘇菲和我主辦一場溫柔的年度晚會。

all.en: We chose a small candlelit hall in Taipei filled with handwritten letters projected softly on every wall.
all.zh: 我們選了台北一間燭光搖曳的小型禮堂，每面牆上都柔和地投影著手寫信件。

all.en: Sophie flew in early to help me prepare, carrying a suitcase of warm Canadian woolen blankets.
all.zh: 蘇菲提早飛來協助我準備，帶著一只塞滿溫暖加拿大羊毛毯的行李箱。

all.en: Guests of all ages walked slowly past the projections, pausing quietly to read other people's gentle words.
all.zh: 各個年齡層的賓客緩緩走過投影，靜靜地停下來閱讀他人溫柔的話語。

all.en: An elderly man cried softly as he recognized his late sister's handwriting glowing on the white wall.
all.zh: 一位年長的男士輕聲落淚，他在白牆上認出了已故姐姐的字跡正柔和地閃爍。

all.en: Sophie held his hand quietly while I fetched him warm tea and a folded clean cotton handkerchief.
all.zh: 蘇菲靜靜地握著他的手，我則為他端來溫熱的茶和一條摺好的乾淨棉布手帕。

all.en: By the gala's end, every chair held a folded letter from a stranger somewhere quietly across the world.
all.zh: 晚會結束時，每張椅子上都放著一封來自世界某個安靜角落的陌生人手寫信。

all.en: Sophie and I walked home along the quiet river, holding hands without needing to speak any words.
all.zh: 蘇菲和我沿著寧靜的河邊走回家，牽著手不需言語。

all.en: Back at my apartment, we filled the empty notebook she gifted me with photos from this beautiful evening.
all.zh: 回到我的公寓後，我們把她送我的那本空白筆記本，填滿這個美麗夜晚的照片。

all.en: Some friendships, we agreed, simply keep planting quiet candles wherever they gently choose to travel together.
all.zh: 我們一致認為，有些友誼只是在它們溫柔結伴前往的每一處，靜靜點起一盞盞燭光。

all.en: Last night, Sophie's heater broke at minus twenty degrees, and she kept the camera on just to feel less alone.
all.zh: 昨晚蘇菲家的暖氣在零下二十度的氣溫下壞了，她開著鏡頭只為了感覺不那麼孤單。

all.en: I learned to set my phone alarm for her early Toronto mornings whenever she has important meetings ahead.
all.zh: 我學會在她多倫多有重要會議的清晨幫她設手機鬧鐘。

all.en: Sophie now mails me her favorite Canadian maple cookies every February before our Lunar New Year celebrations.
all.zh: 蘇菲現在每年二月農曆新年前都會寄她最愛的加拿大楓糖餅乾給我。

all.en: Last Sunday, my dog stole the camera and licked the screen for a full ten minutes straight.
all.zh: 上週日我家狗搶走鏡頭，在螢幕上整整舔了十分鐘。

all.en: Sophie has met every barista at my regular coffee shop just by listening to my morning routine over calls.
all.zh: 蘇菲只透過聽我視訊裡的早晨例行公事，就認識了我常去咖啡店的每一位咖啡師。

all.en: I keep a small printed calendar marking her Toronto holidays so I never accidentally schedule calls during her quiet days.
all.zh: 我桌上放了一本小日曆，標註她多倫多的假日，避免不小心把通話排在她安靜的休息日。

all.en: My mom now joins our Sunday calls for ten minutes, asking Sophie about her vegetables and Canadian weather faithfully.
all.zh: 我媽現在每個星期天通話都加入十分鐘，固定問蘇菲蔬菜吃夠了沒，還有加拿大的天氣。

all.en: Sophie surprised me last week by mailing dried maple leaves she had patiently collected during her long autumn walks.
all.zh: 蘇菲上週給我寄了驚喜，是她在漫長秋日散步中耐心收集的乾燥楓葉。

all.en: I taped them inside her gifted notebook beside the pressed flowers from our shared garden window pot last spring.
all.zh: 我把它們貼進她送的筆記本裡，旁邊是去年春天我們共享窗台花盆裡的壓花。

all.en: Sometimes the screen freezes mid-sentence, but somehow our friendship has never once frozen between any two of our calls.
all.zh: 有時螢幕會在話講到一半時卡住，但我們的友情從來沒有在兩次通話之間結凍過。
